headlines.title: They came for the World Cup. They fell in love with Buc-ee’s and ranch dip.
headlines.description: International tourists traveling through the U.S. ahead of FIFA’s festivities have been documenting their American experiences on social media.

headlines.title: Defense industry leaders to meet with Trump amid missile supply worries, sources say
headlines.description: The president is expected to press the leaders to find ways to swiftly increase production of weaponry for the Pentagon, sources told NBC News.

headlines.title: SpaceX sets its IPO price at $135 per share a day before trading begins
headlines.description: SpaceX on Thursday set its final IPO price at $135, the last stage in a long running process to bring Elon Musk’s space and AI conglomerate public.

headlines.title: Trump nominates Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence
headlines.description: President Donald Trump announced Thursday that he’s nominating Jay Clayton, the U.S.

headlines.title: Data shows just how close these NBA Finals games have been
headlines.description: The Spurs-Knicks games so far have been decided by an average of 4 points. The average margin across NBA Finals series is 11.8 points.

headlines.title: Republicans who pushed Epstein files release see political careers upended by Trump
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has taken political revenge on all four Republicans who signed onto the Epstein files release law.

headlines.title: The inflation surge is hitting businesses, too
headlines.description: Wholesale inflation surged to its highest level since late 2022, as fuel prices pushed higher by the war with Iran ripple across the economy.

headlines.title: SpaceX sets its IPO price at $135 per share a day before trading begins
headlines.description: SpaceX on Thursday set its final IPO price at $135, the last stage in a long running process to bring Elon Musk’s space and AI conglomerate public.

headlines.title: Boston lemonade stand robbed at gunpoint, supects flee and remain at large
headlines.description: Two heartless robbers, one brandishing a gun, knocked off a lemonade stand in Boston on Wednesday, violating the “innocence” of this timeless slice of Americana, authorities said

headlines.title: Video shows California cop accidentally shooting fellow cop in ‘horseplay’ incident
headlines.description: One second an officer is seen drawing his weapon from his holster like a gunslinger and pointing it directly in the direction of a dashcam video camera in an approaching police car.

headlines.title: Father of Harmony Montgomery has conviction for her murder overturned
headlines.description: The New Hampshire Supreme Court on Thursday overturned the murder conviction of a man who was accused of killing his 5-year-old-daughter and moving her body around for months before disposing it.
